/usr/bin/c++ -fsanitize=address -g -fsanitize=address CMakeFiles/WarehouseApp.dir/WarehouseApp_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WarehouseApp.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WarehouseApp.dir/src/models/Product.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WarehouseApp.dir/src/models/User.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WarehouseApp.dir/src/models/Admin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WarehouseApp.dir/src/models/Staff.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WarehouseApp.dir/src/core/FileManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WarehouseApp.dir/src/core/Warehouse.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WarehouseApp.dir/src/gui/LoginWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WarehouseApp.dir/src/gui/DashboardWindow.cpp.o -o WarehouseApp  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.13
